zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléon於大約1052年出生在法國多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯時，他的父親Aimery of Thouars IV30歲，母親Auremgarde Mauleon36歲。他與De Mareuil在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯結婚。他去世於1094年享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléon于大约1052年出生在法国多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯时，他的父亲Aimery of Thouars IV30岁，母亲Auremgarde Mauleon36岁。他与De Mareuil在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯结婚。他去世于1094年享年43岁。

meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléon was born about 1052, in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, France, his father, Aimery of Thouars IV, was 30 and his mother, Auremgarde Mauleon, was 36. He married De Mareuil in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France. He died in 1094, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléon est né environ 1052, à Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, France, son père, Aimery of Thouars IV, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Auremgarde Mauleon, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé De Mareuil à Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France. Il est décédé en 1094, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléon um 1052 in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aimery of Thouars IV 30 und seine Mutter Auremgarde Mauleon 36. Er hat in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich De Mareuil geheiratet. Er starb 1094 im Alter von 43 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléon è nato il circa 1052 nel Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Francia, il suo padre, Aimery of Thouars IV, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Auremgarde Mauleon, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato De Mareuil nel Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Morì nel 1094, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléonが約1052年にフランスデウクス-スevレスソウアルズで生まれた時，父Aimery of Thouars IVは30歳，母Auremgarde Mauleonは36歳であった。フランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスソウアルズでDe Mareuilと結婚した。彼は1094年に43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléon(이)가 대략 1052년 프랑스 데우스-스e브레스 토우아르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aimery of Thouars IV(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Auremgarde Mauleon(은)는 36세였다. 그는 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 토우아르스에서 De Mareuil(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1094년 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléon nasceu aproximadamente 1052, em Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, França, seu pai, Aimery of Thouars IV, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Auremgarde Mauleon, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com De Mareuil em Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França. Ele faleceu em 1094, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléon родился около 1052 г. в местности тоуарс, деукс-сeвресь, Франция, его отцу по имени Aimery of Thouars IV было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Auremgarde Mauleon, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени De Mareuil в местности тоуарс, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. Он умер в 1094 г. в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte de Thouars Raoul II seigneur de Mauléon nació aproximadamente 1052, en Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Francia, su papá, Aimery of Thouars IV, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Auremgarde Mauleon, tenía 36 años. Se casó con De Mareuil en Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Murió en 1094, a la edad de 43 años.
